final_answer: Action boundary remains open. CERT-JAD-090 lists TX-44 certificate but does not confirm exemption-status class. WARN-JAD-090 requires verification. Per STD-JAD-090-P, sale cannot proceed until status-class matches exactly. Escalate for resolution of unresolved dependency.
